data.title: Transparent Partners and Kana Announce Strategic Partnership to Deliver Enterprise-Grade Agentic AI for Marketing
data.description: In Chicago and San Francisco, Kana, an AI-native marketing platform created by the founders of Krux (bought by Salesforce) and Rapt (acquired by Microsoft), and Transparent Partners, a prominent martech and data consulting firm, have revealed a key collaboration to assist businesses in implementing agentic marketing on a larger scale. This venture merges Transparent Partners’ established methodologies in data strategy, tech infrastructure, and operational preparedness with Kana's comprehensive agentic marketing solution. This partnership aims to empower enterprises to embrace agentic marketing effectively and efficiently.

data.title: Welldoc® Honored with 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, Welldoc®, a prominent health tech company utilizing artificial intelligence, has recently been acknowledged as a recipient in the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards by the Business Intelligence Group (BIG). This esteemed recognition highlights global organizations that are leading the way in implementing ethical AI practices that showcase tangible results. Specifically, Welldoc stood out in the Health Product section, securing this accolade for the third consecutive year. Through the integration of clinical accuracy and supervised AI functionalities, Welldoc is able to provide impactful health solutions.

data.title: inMorphis Named as ServiceNow Partner of the Year 2026 - Risk & Security - Asia Pacific
data.description: On March 26, 2026, inMorphis was awarded the prestigious 2026 ServiceNow Partner of the Year Award in Boston. The award acknowledges the company's exceptional accomplishments and impact on the ServiceNow ecosystem. Specifically, inMorphis received the "Partner award 2026 – Risk & Security."

data.title: Aecon schedules first quarter 2026 financial results release and conference call
data.description: Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) revealed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial outcomes on April 28, 2026, post-market closure. A live webcast and conference call are set for April 29, 2026, at 9 a.m. (Eastern Time) to discuss the numbers.
